LETLOOSE

This game was a group project. I worked with Grace Perry and Gabriel Farley to make this game using Processing.

Check out the GITHUB REPOSITORY

I personally made the majority of graphics as well as all of the sound effects and the implementation of them. I also created a "MusicManage" class that worked to make adaptive music possible. When in range of an enemy, the music will smoothly transition to a more intense version of the background music. (I also made this music myself)



Space Game
